mapper.select: SELECT item_code FROM consignment_external_supplier UNION SELECT item_code FROM consignment_internal_supplier ORDER BY item_code

SELECT id, item_code, supplier_code, supplier_type, supplier_contract, consignee_company, consignee_store, current_inventory_qty, created_at, updated_at FROM consignment_external_supplier WHERE item_code = #{itemCode} ORDER BY created_at ASC
SELECT id, item_code, supplier_code, supplier_store, consignee_company, consignee_store, created_at FROM consignment_internal_supplier WHERE item_code = #{itemCode} ORDER BY created_at ASC
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO consignment_external_supplier ( id, item_code, supplier_code, supplier_type, supplier_contract, consignee_company, consignee_store, current_inventory_qty, created_at, updated_at ) VALUES ( #{id}, #{itemCode}, #{supplierCode}, #{supplierType}, #{supplierContract}, #{consigneeCompany}, #{consigneeStore}, #{currentInventoryQty}, CURRENT_TIMESTAMP, CURRENT_TIMESTAMP )
mapper.update: UPDATE consignment_external_supplier SET supplier_code = #{supplierCode}, supplier_type = #{supplierType}, supplier_contract = #{supplierContract}, consignee_company = #{consigneeCompany}, consignee_store = #{consigneeStore}, current_inventory_qty = #{currentInventoryQty}, updated_at = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP WHERE item_code = #{itemCode} AND id = #{id}
